title: What is a Computer?
subtitle: Smart Machines Around Us!
overview: In this session, students learn what a computer is, identify different types and sizes of computers, and discuss where they have seen computers in real life such as homes, schools, hospitals, shops, railway stations, and mobile phones.

images._note: Add real classroom photos, computer lab images, laptop photos, tablets, ATM machines, and students using computers.

Tablet computer used for learning and games
Smartphone is also a small computer
ATM machine uses a computer to give money

keyTopics: Computer = Smart Machine that helps us work fast
Where we see computers in daily life
Computer in School, Hospital, Bank, Shop, Railway Station

activity.title: Identify Computers Around You
parts: Pictures of ATM, hospital, shop billing machine
steps: Ask students where they have seen these devices
Students identify computer size — big or small
Discuss how each computer helps people
Students draw their favorite computer device
Challenge: Find 5 computers at home or outside

options: A smart machine that helps us work and learn
quiz.explanation: A computer is a smart electronic machine that helps us study, play games, draw, calculate and do many tasks quickly.

quiz.q: Which of these is a computer?
quiz.explanation: Laptop, desktop and tablet are all types of computers.

quiz.q: Which computer can we easily carry in a bag?
quiz.explanation: Laptop is portable and easy to carry.
Computers are used almost everywhere in daily life.

quiz.q: Which device is also a small computer?
quiz.explanation: Smartphones are small computers that can call, calculate, play games and use the internet.

quiz.q: What do students use computers for?
quiz.explanation: Students use computers for many educational and fun activities.

quiz.q: Which computer is usually kept on a table?
quiz.explanation: Desktop computers are usually placed on desks or tables.

quiz.q: What does a computer help us do?
quiz.explanation: Computers help us in many ways including learning and working faster.

quiz.q: Which machine gives money using a computer?
quiz.explanation: ATM machines use computers to manage bank transactions.
Many hospital workers use computers for patient records and reports.

quiz.q: Which is the biggest computer among these?
quiz.explanation: Desktop computers are generally bigger than laptops, tablets and phones.

quiz.q: What can we do on a computer?

quiz.explanation: Computers need electricity or battery power to work.

quiz.q: Which of these is NOT a computer?
quiz.explanation: A pencil is not an electronic computer device.
Computers help us complete work quickly and efficiently.
